headline: Chipotle is becoming 'the place for clean protein': CFO on menu success
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) maintained its full-year guidance while just slightly beating first quarter revenue estimates ($3.09 billion vs. expectations of $3.07 billion). The stock continues to see a slight boost since reporting earnings results on Wednesday. Chipotle CFO Adam Rymer comes on Market Domination to talk more about the fast-casual chain's value it offers to consumers and the success of its high-protein menu items.

headline: Chipotle Is Finding New Ways to Win, The High-End Bull Case Says the Stock Could Run Another 60%
summary: Chipotle (NYSE:CMG) has had a rough stretch. Shares trade at around $34, down 10% year-to-date and 33% over the past year after 2025 became the first full year of negative comp sales in company history. But the burrito chain just delivered a fresh quarter that hints at a turn. Q1 2026 revenue came in at ... headline: Chipotle Gets Mixed Calls After Q1: Are April Comp Trends Enough to Bring Bulls Back?
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill‘s (NYSE:CMG) Q1 2026 results drew a split verdict from Wall Street, with Barclays trimming its price target to $38 from $40 while Stephens lifted its target to $39 from $38.
